prompt_text:
### Demographics: 45-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 1 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia; Nausea and reduced appetite over the last 1-2 months after starting injections.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
Fibrosis
Body mass index category: Overweight
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Fibrosis; BMI Category: Overweight
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Sitagliptin 100mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Fluticasone/salmeterol Inhaler (twice daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Amlodipine (5 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 68.8 kg; Height 168.9 cm; BMI 24.1 kg/m²; Blood pressure 129/69 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.6%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 9.5%; 3 months ago 9.7%; current 9.5%), FPG (12 months ago 238mg/dL; 9 months ago 242mg/dL; 6 months ago 269mg/dL; 3 months ago 251mg/dL; current 240mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 68.1kg; 9 months ago 67.8kg; 6 months ago 69.2kg; 3 months ago 69.3kg; current 68.8kg), Height (12 months ago 168.9cm; 9 months ago 168.9cm; 6 months ago 168.9cm; 3 months ago 168.9cm; current 168.9cm), BMI (12 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 24.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 24.0kg/m²; current 24.1kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 123mmHg; 6 months ago 129mmHg; 3 months ago 125mmHg; current 129mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 73mmHg; 9 months ago 72mmHg; 6 months ago 69mmHg; 3 months ago 70mmHg; current 69mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 56U/L; 9 months ago 56U/L; 6 months ago 64U/L; 3 months ago 55U/L; current 58U/L), AST (12 months ago 50U/L; 9 months ago 52U/L; 6 months ago 58U/L; 3 months ago 52U/L; current 54U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.5mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.6mg/dL; current 1.6mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 88mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 86mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 85mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 85mL/min/1.73m²; current 86mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 50mg/g; 9 months ago 39mg/g; 6 months ago 54mg/g; 3 months ago 39mg/g; current 47mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 74mg/dL; 9 months ago 80mg/dL; 6 months ago 76mg/dL; 3 months ago 79mg/dL; current 78mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 40mg/dL; 9 months ago 42mg/dL; 6 months ago 43mg/dL; 3 months ago 42mg/dL; current 41mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 154mg/dL; 9 months ago 141mg/dL; 6 months ago 156mg/dL; 3 months ago 142mg/dL; current 148mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.8g/dL; current 12.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has limited financial resources and prefers low-cost options (budget ≤ KRW 200,000/month).
